title: Compact Cell
description: An addon for AE2 to create a compact world
body:
一个AE附属，可以替代压缩空间的作用，
把空间原件放入便携式压缩空间原件内，右键即可传送。
把便携式压缩空间原件放入ME驱动器，用绑定工具右键，即可链接对应便携式原件内，空间原件所生成维度的智能空间端口和驱动器所在网络。
智能空间端口本身具备传递ae2网络，和能量的功能
模组暂缺少多国语言翻译文件，欢迎添加，该模组已开源，https://github.com/TaoLe-si/CompactCell

An AE2 addon that can replace the function of a compact space. Place the space component into a portable compact space component, and right-click to teleport. Place the portable compact space component into an ME driver, right-click with a binding tool, and you can link the intelligent space port generated by the space component in the corresponding portable component to the network where the driver is located. The intelligent space port itself has the function of transmitting AE2 networks and energy. This module has been open-sourced, https://github.com/TaoLe-si/CompactCell
